steps.title: Use the purpose structure
steps.content: The sentence says Dr. Navarro “uses chemistry and fossil evidence ___ oceans as they were in the past.” The structure “uses X to do Y” requires an infinitive to show purpose.

steps.title: Select the infinitive
steps.content: Choice A uses a perfect-tense verb, and Choice C uses a past-tense form. Choice D is a present-tense verb that does not show purpose after “uses evidence.” The sentence needs “to study.” The answer is B.
